DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta` is the core workspace CLI for creating, inspecting, editing, comparing, and maintaining modeled metadata.
Insert many instances from tsv/csv input.
Diff/merge instances and apply instance updates.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta instance relationship set Measure 1 --to Cube 2

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Inspect and edit model entities, properties, and relationships.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationSubject.Summary: View entity schema or one instance.
Deploy generated artifacts to external targets.
Input directory containing generated SQL scripts.
Environment variable name that contains the target SQL Server connection string.
Optional database to create/use before deployment.
Export workspace data to external formats.
C# only. Emit optional tooling helpers in <Model>.Tooling.cs.
Import from SQL into a new workspace, or import CSV into new/existing workspace.
Required for sql; optional for csv (mutually exclusive with --workspace).
Use existing workspace for csv import.
Show workspace summary and model/instance sizes.
Add a property to an entity.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Change whether a property is required.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown
meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required false
meta model rename-property Cube Purpose Description
meta model rename-relationship System SystemType --role PrimarySystemType
meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Convert a property into a relationship.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id
meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.ProductId --target Product --lookup Id --role ProductRef --preserve-property

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Convert a relationship into a property.

DocumentationSubject.NativeId: meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Warehouse
meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Product --role ProductRef --property ProductId

DocumentationSubject.Summary: Show inbound relationships for an entity.
Import CSV data into a workspace.
Import SQL metadata into a new workspace.
Diff instance data for two workspaces with byte-identical model.xml.
Diff mapped instance data using an explicit alignment workspace.
Apply an equal-model instance diff artifact to a target workspace.
Apply an aligned instance diff artifact to a target workspace.
Target entity, relationship role, or implied relationship field name, followed by target instance id.
Merge two full workspaces into a new workspace.
